title: Payments API error rate spike after deploy
injected_root_cause: Commit a1b2c3d removed a null-check on `customer.billing_address` in the payments validation path, causing NullPointerException for any request where billing_address is omitted (a valid, common case for digital-goods-only orders).
red_herrings: commit e4f5g6h deployed only ~2 minutes before the alert, and to the naive eye 'most recent deploy' looks suspicious — but it touches svc-notifications, which shows zero error-rate movement in the metrics. A correct investigation should rule this out on the basis of service-correlation, not just recency.
